title: Dusting chickpea with fine rock powder: Effects on yield and damage caused by helicoverpa ormigera
abstract: The effect of dusting 2 chickpea [Cicer arietinum] cultivars, ICCX 79012 and Annigeri, with fine rock powder at flowering on the damage caused by the noctuid Helicoverpa armigera was studied in India. No significant differences in damage were observed between dusted and nondusted ICCX 79012, while damage to Annigeri was increased by dusting. Yields were significantly higher in dusted than in non-dusted plots.
